data.description: Sub-account of Cash and Cash Equivalents
Sub-account of Cash and Cash Equivalents
Sub-account of Cash and Cash Equivalents
Cash box for driver floats and reimbursements
Input tax credits - GST paid on expenses
Credit card merchant deposits - Square/Moneris batch settlements
Vehicle financing and equipment loans - CIBC account 8314462
MoneyMart prepaid Visa card balances - Asset account for card loads
Charges to customers for beverages provided (compare to 5310 cost)
Fair market value of services received in trade (e.g., Fibrenew rent)
Water, pop, chips purchased for limousine service (compare to revenue recovery)
Bar/liquor purchases for business meetings, client entertainment (50% deductible)
Meals for drivers during charter shifts (business expense)
Client dinners, prospect meetings, networking events (50% deductible CRA)
Client gifts, promotional items, referral incentives
Donations for community relations, event sponsorships (tax receipts issued)
Charter services traded for goods/services (FMV basis - e.g., Fibrenew rent exchange)
Software subscriptions, association dues, business networks
Networking events, industry conferences, business relationship building
Expenses with business AND personal use (track allocation % for CRA)
Business supplies not classified elsewhere (cleaning, tools, etc.)
Food, coffee, balloons, and other amenities provided to charter clients
Personal expenses paid through business (move to Owner Draw quarterly)
